prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data".
First locate where Item 7A stops on this page:
- If the "Item 8" heading is visible on this page, Item 7A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Ignore ALL text below that heading; it belongs to the next section, not Item 7A.
- The target section may have started on a previous page and may leave only a short carryover at the very TOP of this page.
- If the next-section heading appears near the top, the answer may be only the few lines immediately above that heading.
- Only if no later section heading appears on this page should you use the bottom of the page as Item 7A's ending.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 7A right before the section ends. The answer must come only from Item 7A, even if the next section occupies most of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
the functional currencies as of December 31, 2025 and December 31, 2024, income before income taxes would have been approximately $1 million and
$38 million lower, respectively, after considering the offsetting impact of the foreign currency exchange contracts and our net investment hedges.
